973	variable {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {ι : Type*} (s : ι → R)
974	variable (M : Type u) [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
975	
976	/-- The un-localised section Čech coefficient `D_σ = M_{s_σ}`. -/
977	abbrev dCoeff {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) : Type u :=
978	  LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M
979	
980	/-- The un-localised coface comparison `δ : M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}} → M_{s_σ}` (R-linear), the
981	canonical localisation map for the divisibility `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`. -/
982	noncomputable def dCoface (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
983	    dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
984	  comparison
985	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
986	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
987	    (Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
988	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M))
989	
990	/-- The un-localised differential `d : D^m → D^{m+1}` as an `R`-linear map: the
991	alternating sum of cofaces, assembled with `LinearMap.pi` over the output tuple. -/
992	noncomputable def dDiff (m : ℕ) :
993	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :=
994	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
995	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (dCoface s M m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
996	
997	/-- Apply form of `dDiff`: the alternating sum of cofaces of the deleted faces. -/
998	lemma dDiff_apply (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
999	    dDiff s M m t σ
1000	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • dCoface s M m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
1001	  rw [dDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
1002	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
1003	
1004	variable (r : ι)
1005	
1006	/-- The per-index localisation comparison `M_{s_σ} → M_{s_r · s_σ}` carrying the
1007	un-localised coefficient to the `cechCoeff` coefficient localised at `s_r`. -/
1008	noncomputable def dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1009	    dCoeff s M σ →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
1010	  comparison
1011	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
1012	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
1013	    (Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r))
1014	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
1015	
1016	/-- **Transitivity payoff**: `dToCech` exhibits the localised coefficient
1017	`cechCoeff = M_{s_r · s_σ}` as the localisation of the un-localised coefficient
1018	`M_{s_σ}` away from the spanning element `s_r`.  Direct from
1019	`AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule`; this is the per-coefficient input the
1020	`exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction of the section Čech complex consumes. -/
1021	lemma dToCech_isLocalizedModule {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1022	    IsLocalizedModule.Away (s r) (dToCech s M r σ) := by
1023	  haveI inst : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ * s r))
1024	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M) := by
1025	    rw [mul_comm]; infer_instance
1026	  unfold dToCech
1027	  exact comparison_isLocalizedModule (a := sprod s σ) (b := s r) _ _ _
1028	
1029	/-- **Per-coface localisation naturality**: the localised coface `cechCoface`
1030	intertwines the per-index comparison `dToCech` with the un-localised coface
1031	`dCoface`.  Both composites are away-comparison maps from `M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}}` to
1032	`M_{s_r · s_σ}`, hence equal by `comparison_comp`.  This is the square that, summed
1033	over the alternating signs, identifies the localised differential
1034	`IsLocalizedModule.map (dDiff)` with `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` —
1035	the final brick of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction. -/
1036	lemma cechCoface_dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
1037	    (x : dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
1038	    cechCoface s M r m σ j (dToCech s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) x)
1039	      = dToCech s M r σ (dCoface s M m σ j x) := by
1040	  simp only [cechCoface, dToCech, dCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
1041	  rw [comparison_comp_apply, comparison_comp_apply]
1042	  exact Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_trans (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j) (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r)))
1043	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
1044	
1045	/-- **Differential-naturality square** (the heart of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span`
1046	reduction): localising the un-localised differential `dDiff` at a spanning element
1047	`s_r` — via the per-index comparisons `dToCech` — yields the localised differential
1048	`CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)`.  Summing the per-coface squares
1049	`cechCoface_dToCech` over the alternating signs.  Combined with
1050	`dToCech_isLocalizedModule`, `IsLocalizedModule.pi`, and the uniqueness of
1051	`IsLocalizedModule.map`, this identifies the localised `dDiff` with the
1052	exact complex `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
1053	lemma dToCech_comm (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :
1054	    CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r) (m := m)
1055	        (fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (t σ))
1056	      = fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (dDiff s M m t σ) := by
1057	  funext σ
1058	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
1059	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => ?_
1060	  rw [map_zsmul, cechCoface_dToCech]
1061	
1062	/-! ### Assembly of step (a): positive-degree exactness of `D•`
1063	
1064	The localised differential at a fixed index `r`, bundled as an `R`-linear map
1065	(`locDiff`), so that `IsLocalizedModule.map` uniqueness identifies it with the
1066	localisation of `dDiff`.  Everything here is at a *fixed* index `r : ι` (no
1067	`Classical.choose`), hence friction-free; the spanning-element bookkeeping is
1068	confined to the final `dDiff_exact`. -/
1069	
1070	/-- R-linear underlying map of the localised coface `cechCoface` (the `comparison`
1071	before `.toAddMonoidHom`). -/
1072	noncomputable def cechCofaceLin (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
1073	    cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
1074	  comparison
1075	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
1076	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
1077	    (Inverts.of_dvd (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j))
1078	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
1079	
1080	lemma cechCoface_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
1081	    (x : cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
1082	    cechCoface s M r m σ j x = cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j x := rfl
1083	
1084	/-- The localised section Čech differential at index `r`, as a bundled `R`-linear
1085	map (mirrors `dDiff` with the localised cofaces). -/
1086	noncomputable def locDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1087	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
1088	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1089	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
1090	
1091	lemma locDiff_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ)
1092	    (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
1093	    locDiff s M r m t σ
1094	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1095	          (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
1096	  rw [locDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
1097	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
1098	
1099	/-- `locDiff` agrees, as a raw function, with the localised combinatorial
1100	differential `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` already shown exact. -/
1101	lemma locDiff_eq_depDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1102	    ⇑(locDiff s M r m)
1103	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ)
1104	          (cechCoface s M r) (m := m) := by
1105	  funext t σ
1106	  rw [locDiff_apply]
1107	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff]
1108	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => by rw [cechCoface_apply]
1109	
1110	/-- Positive-degree exactness of the bundled localised differential, transported
1111	from `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
1112	lemma locDiff_exact (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1113	    Function.Exact (locDiff s M r (m + 1)) (locDiff s M r (m + 2)) := by
1114	  rw [locDiff_eq_depDiff, locDiff_eq_depDiff]
1115	  exact CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact s M r m
1116	
1117	/-- The product localisation map `D^m → ∏_σ M_{s_r·s_σ}` at index `r`. -/
1118	noncomputable def fLoc (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1119	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
1120	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => dToCech s M r σ ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj σ
1121	
1122	lemma fLoc_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1123	    fLoc s M r m t σ = dToCech s M r σ (t σ) := by
1124	  simp only [fLoc, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.proj_apply]
1125	
1126	/-- `fLoc` exhibits the product localised coefficient as the localisation of `D^m`
1127	away from `s_r` (from `IsLocalizedModule.pi` + `dToCech_isLocalizedModule`). -/
1128	instance fLoc_isLocalizedModule [Finite ι] (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1129	    IsLocalizedModule.Away (s r) (fLoc s M r m) := by
1130	  haveI : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (s r)) (dToCech s M r σ) :=
1131	    fun σ => dToCech_isLocalizedModule s M r σ
1132	  exact IsLocalizedModule.pi (Submonoid.powers (s r)) fun σ => dToCech s M r σ
1133	
1134	/-- The localised differential intertwines `fLoc` with `dDiff` (the `dToCech_comm`
1135	square, packaged through the bundled maps). -/
1136	lemma locDiff_fLoc (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :
1137	    locDiff s M r m (fLoc s M r m t) = fLoc s M r (m + 1) (dDiff s M m t) := by
1138	  have h1 : ⇑(locDiff s M r m) (fLoc s M r m t)
1139	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r) (m := m)
1140	          (fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (t σ)) := by
1141	    rw [locDiff_eq_depDiff]
1142	    exact congrArg _ (funext fun σ => fLoc_apply s M r m t σ)
1143	  rw [h1, dToCech_comm]
1144	  funext σ
1145	  exact (fLoc_apply s M r (m + 1) (dDiff s M m t) σ).symm
1146	
1147	/-- `IsLocalizedModule.map` of `dDiff` is the bundled localised differential
1148	`locDiff` — by `IsLocalizedModule.ext`, the comparison reducing to `locDiff_fLoc`.
1149	Stated for an arbitrary away element `a` (with `s r = a`) so the spanning-element
1150	bookkeeping in `dDiff_exact` needs no `↑ρ`-rewrite inside the localised map. -/
1151	lemma map_dDiff_eq_locDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) {a : R}
1152	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m)]
1153	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r (m + 1))] :
1154	    IsLocalizedModule.map (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m) (fLoc s M r (m + 1))
1155	        (dDiff s M m) = locDiff s M r m := by
1156	  apply IsLocalizedModule.ext (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m)
1157	    (fun x => IsLocalizedModule.map_units (fLoc s M r (m + 1)) x)
1158	  apply LinearMap.ext; intro t
1159	  rw [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, IsLocalizedModule.map_apply, locDiff_fLoc]
1160	
1161	/-- A chosen `ι`-index realising a spanning-set element as `s i`, kept opaque so
1162	the spanning-element rewrite in `dDiff_exact` has a type-correct motive (the index
1163	must not syntactically contain `↑ρ`). -/
1164	private noncomputable def spanIdx (ρ : ↑(Set.range s)) : ι := ρ.2.choose
1165	
1166	omit [CommRing R] in
1167	private lemma spanIdx_spec (ρ : ↑(Set.range s)) : s (spanIdx s ρ) = ↑ρ := ρ.2.choose_spec
1168	
1169	/-- **Step (a): positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module
1170	complex `D•`** (`lem:cech_acyclic_affine`, the `R`-module core).  For a spanning
1171	family `s : ι → R` (`Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤`), the complex
1172	`∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is exact in positive degrees.  Reduced — via
1173	`exact_of_isLocalized_span` localising at each spanning element `s_r` — to the
1174	exactness `locDiff_exact` of the localised complexes (which is the dependent
1175	combinatorial core `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`), through the localised-
1176	differential identification `map_dDiff_eq_locDiff`. -/
1177	lemma dDiff_exact [Finite ι] (hs : Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤) (m : ℕ) :
1178	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1179	  classical
1180	  haveI inst1 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1181	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1)) := fun ρ => by
1182	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1183	  haveI inst2 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1184	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2)) := fun ρ => by
1185	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1186	  haveI inst3 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1187	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 3)) := fun ρ => by
1188	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1189	  refine exact_of_isLocalized_span (Set.range s) hs
1190	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1191	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1))
1192	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1193	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2))
1194	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 3) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1195	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 3))
1196	    (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) fun ρ => ?_
1197	  rw [map_dDiff_eq_locDiff s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1),
1198	    map_dDiff_eq_locDiff s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2)]
1199	  exact locDiff_exact s M (spanIdx s ρ) m

1201	set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
1202	-- raised: the change-of-ring ladder repeatedly synthesises `AddMonoidHomClass` over the
1203	-- `dCoeff`-abbreviated `LocalizedModule` carriers, which is instance-search heavy.
1204	set_option synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 800000 in
1205	/-- **Route-B positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module complex
1206	`D•` over a standard *sub*cover of `D(f)`** (`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`,
1207	module core).  Here `s = g` need NOT span the unit ideal of `R`; only its image `s/1`
1208	spans the unit ideal of the away ring `R_f` (`hspan`), and each `s i` lies in `√(f)`
1209	(`hmem`).  The complex `∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is then exact in positive degrees.
1210	
1211	Route B (change-of-ring): instantiate `dDiff_exact` over `R_f = Localization.Away f` with
1212	the module `M_f = LocalizedModule (powers f) M` and the spanning family `s/1`, then transport
1213	the resulting positive-degree exactness back to the `R`-side along the degreewise additive
1214	isomorphisms `M_{s_σ} ≅ (M_f)_{s_σ}` (`AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` + the
1215	universal `IsLocalizedModule.iso`), which intertwine the alternating-sum localisation
1216	differentials. -/
1217	lemma dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway [Finite ι] (f : R)
1218	    (hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k)
1219	    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤)
1220	    (m : ℕ) :
1221	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1222	  classical
1223	  set Rf := Localization.Away f with hRf
1224	  set Mf := LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers f) M with hMf
1225	  set g' : ι → Rf := fun i => algebraMap R Rf (s i) with hg'
1226	  -- `R_f`-side positive-degree exactness (the black-box reuse of `dDiff_exact`).
1227	  have Hf : Function.Exact (dDiff g' Mf (m + 1)) (dDiff g' Mf (m + 2)) :=
1228	    dDiff_exact g' Mf hspan m
1229	  -- `sprod g' σ` is the image of `sprod s σ`.
1230	  have hsprod : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin n → ι), sprod g' σ = algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ) := by
1231	    intro n σ; simp only [g', sprod, map_prod]
1232	  -- per (nonempty) `σ`: `f` divides a power of `sprod s σ`.
1233	  have hdvd : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), ∃ k, f ∣ sprod s σ ^ k := by
1234	    intro n σ
1235	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hmem (σ 0)
1236	    refine ⟨k, ?_⟩
1237	    have he : sprod s σ ^ k = s (σ 0) ^ k * (∏ x : Fin n, s (σ x.succ)) ^ k := by
1238	      rw [sprod, Fin.prod_univ_succ, mul_pow]
1239	    rw [he]; exact hk.mul_right _
1240	  -- the composite localisation structure map `M → M_f → (M_f)_{s_σ}` localises `M` at `s_σ`.
1241	  have inst_comp : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
1242	      IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1243	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1244	          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M) := by
1245	    intro n σ
1246	    obtain ⟨k, h, hh⟩ := hdvd σ
1247	    haveI : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ)))
1248	        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf) := by
1249	      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
1250	    exact AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away f (sprod s σ) h hh
1251	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)
1252	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf)
1253	  -- the per-σ `R`-linear comparison `(M_f)_{s_σ} ≅ M_{s_σ}` (Rf-side → R-side).
1254	  let eσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), dCoeff g' Mf σ ≃ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
1255	    fun {n} σ =>
1256	      haveI := inst_comp σ
1257	      (IsLocalizedModule.iso (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1258	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1259	          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)).symm
1260	  -- `eσL τ` undoes the composite structure map: it sends `compMap τ mval ↦ mk_{s_τ} mval`.
1261	  have heσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (τ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) (mval : M),
1262	      eσL τ ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf)
1263	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval))
1264	        = LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ)) M mval := by
1265	    intro n τ mval
1266	    haveI := inst_comp τ
1267	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun (IsLocalizedModule.iso_symm_comp (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ))
1268	      ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1269	        LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)) mval
1270	  -- per-coface naturality: `eσ` intertwines the two cofaces.
1271	  have nat : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 2) → ι) (j : Fin (n + 2))
1272	      (z : dCoeff g' Mf (σ ∘ j.succAbove)),
1273	      eσL σ (dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j z)
1274	        = dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) z) := by
1275	    intro n σ j z
